title: HyperLeash
description: Leash mobs to fireworks! Leash mobs to each other!
body:
### HyperLeash allows you to leash mobs to each other, and launch leashed mobs in the air with fireworks!

Wanna know more? Check out the video showcase below (older version, new tutorial coming)!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-zG4OZPf3aw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Tutorial
There are two main features of HyperLeash:
- Crouching while leashing multiple mobs connects them to each other instead of to you.
- Launching a firework with mobs leashed to you will attach them to the firework.
